name: Cloak of Arachnida
entries: This fine garment is made of black silk interwoven with faint, silvery threads. While wearing it, you gain the following benefits.

entries.name: Poison Resistance
entries: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Poison damage.

entries.name: Spider Climb
entries: You have a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free.

entries.name: Spider Walk
entries: You can't be caught in webs of any sort and can move through webs as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.

entries.name: Web
entries: You can cast {@spell Web|XPHB} (save {@dc 13}). The web created by the spell fills twice its normal area. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
